name: create_work_item
description: Create a new work item in an Azure DevOps project. Work item types include Bug, Task, User Story, Epic, and Feature. The request body uses JSON Patch format with an array of operations to set field values like title, description, assigned user, priority, and iteration path.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The name of the Azure DevOps organization.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: The name or ID of the project.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The work item type: 'Bug', 'Task', 'User Story', 'Epic', or 'Feature'.

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: Version of the API to use. Use '7.1'.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Array of JSON Patch operations. Each operation has 'op' (add/replace/remove), 'path' (field reference path like '/fields/System.Title'), and 'value'.

body.value: Add OAuth2 login with Google and GitHub providers. Include token refresh logic.

fields.System.Title: Implement user authentication flow
fields.System.Description: Add OAuth2 login with Google and GitHub providers. Include token refresh logic.
